value.found_quote: For code-first SDK workflows, start with [Integrations and observability](https://developers.openai.com/api/docs/guides/agents/integrations-observability#tracing) to get high-signal traces before you formalize graders.
value.rationale: The page explicitly references "Integrations and observability" as an offering within OpenAI's platform and describes its purpose as providing "high-signal traces" specifically for "code-first SDK workflows," which directly substantiates the claim. The link and description match the claim's description precisely.
